current.summary: Layers 1, 3, and 4 complete and pushed. Layer 2 blocked: the registry repo agent-ecosystem/agent-skill-implementation does not exist on GitHub yet.

activeWork.description: Implement --to-all flag and benchmark skill installer workflow
activeWork.progress: Layer 1 (--to-all flag): COMPLETE — 20/20 TestInstall* tests pass, committed de44f8f. Layer 2 (benchmark registry): BLOCKED — repo agent-ecosystem/agent-skill-implementation does not exist on GitHub. Layer 3 (workflow doc): COMPLETE — docs/research/skill-behavior-checks/workflow-syllago-install.md committed a0b39e5. Layer 4 (roadmap): COMPLETE — syllago-k55bj bead created, README roadmap entry added, committed dd45334. All pushed to remote (e1cec09).
blockers: Layer 2 blocked: GitHub repo agent-ecosystem/agent-skill-implementation does not exist. Cannot add registry or import benchmark skills until the repo is published.

git.lastCommit: e1cec09 chore: regenerate commands.json with --to-all flag

recentDecisions: Layer 2 is blocked on external GitHub repo publication — not a syllago code issue
commands.json regeneration is required after any CLI flag changes (pre-push hook enforces this)
telemetry.Enrich was added to runInstallToAll for content_type, content_count, dry_run
nextSteps: Wait for agent-ecosystem/agent-skill-implementation to be published on GitHub
Once published, run: syllago registry add agent-ecosystem/agent-skill-implementation
Task 2.2a: syllago list --type skills --from agent-skill-implementation (verify 17+ skills found)
Task 2.5: Canary phrase verification — open fresh Claude Code session, ask 'Do you know CARDINAL-ZEBRA-7742?'

context.notes: Layer 1 is fully implemented and tested. The --to-all flag detects providers via DetectProvidersWithResolver, loops over active providers, calls installToProvider helper per provider, classifies outcomes (installed/skipped/failed/no-items), prints summary table, and returns error only for actual failures (not expected skips like 'does not support'). Telemetry enrichment included for content_type, content_count, dry_run. The installToProvider helper is reusable for future multi-provider operations.

previousSessions.summary: Reviewed benchmark installer implementation plan — assessed current state, all 4 layers are unstarted. Creating handoff for future execution.
